title: T-015 — ManualInput + qty keypad component (06-a)
prompt:
# T-015 — ManualInput primitive (text + qty keypad)

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-008, §9.1, §9.7
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md §4.3 qty keypad sheet
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver `<ManualInput onSubmit={(value)=>...} mode='text'|'qty' />` — text input + numeric 3×4 keypad (1-9, 0, ⌫) — used as fallback for any scan screen and as the primary qty entry across SCN-020/050/080/082/084.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/components/manual-input.tsx`:
   - mode='text': single text input + 48dp submit button.
   - mode='qty': 3×4 numeric keypad (digit, 0, backspace), 64dp tiles, large display showing current value 28px monospace.
2. Server-side V-SCAN-INPUT-003 length≤100 echoed client-side (zod max 100).
3. RTL test for both modes; keypad asserts backspace and submit behavior.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/components/manual-input.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/manual-input.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given mode='qty' renders, when compared to the prototype qty keypad at `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/modals.jsx:251-275` (qty_keypad_sheet), then it has the same 3×4 grid, the same digit order 1..9, 0, backspace, the same 28px monospace value display, and a submit button — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
2. Given mode='text', when the user types 'LP-12345' and clicks submit, then onSubmit is invoked exactly once with 'LP-12345'
3. Given mode='qty' value '12' and the user taps backspace, when the keypad re-renders, then the displayed value is '1' and submit emits 1 as a number on click

## Test strategy
- RED: write manual-input.test.tsx asserting parity + text submit + qty backspace before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test manual-input'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-numeric input in mode='qty'
- Do not allow empty submit in either mode
- Do not exceed 100 characters in mode='text'

pipeline_inputs.description: ManualInput component supporting text fallback and 3×4 numeric qty keypad used by every quantity step.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) Same 3×4 keypad layout as qty_keypad_sheet prototype.
2) Digit order 1-9 then 0 then backspace; 64dp tiles.
3) 28px monospace value display.
4) Submit blocked on empty value.
5) Text mode enforces max 100 characters.

Do not implement camera fallback here (T-014)
Do not implement scan-first input here (T-013)

Given mode='text', when user types 'LP-12345' and clicks submit, then onSubmit is invoked once with 'LP-12345'
Given mode='qty' value '12' and user taps backspace, when re-rendered the value is '1' and submit emits 1 as a number
test_strategy: RED: write manual-input.test.tsx asserting parity + text submit + qty backspace before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not allow non-numeric input in mode='qty'
